query: SELECT role_family, job_function, first_name, last_name FROM users WHERE tenant_id = (SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE slug = 'acme') AND (role_family IS NULL OR role_family = '' OR role_family = 'other') ORDER BY first_name LIMIT 20;
